title: Verified INSIGHTS restore activation
content: A[Restore request with expected current fingerprint] --> B[Verify source backup independently]
B -->|invalid| X[Stable failure active generation unchanged]
C --> D[Restore state and apply compatible migrations]
D --> E[Verify counts links payload hashes idempotency deletion state and permissions]
E --> F[Record restore outcome in candidate and reverify]
F --> G[Acquire exclusive INSIGHTS writer lock]
H -->|yes| I[Flush candidate and atomically replace CURRENT]
I --> J[Fsync directory and return activated generation]
J --> K[Prior generation remains recovery point]
